steps.title: Interpret the input
steps.content: The variable $x$ represents the number of years after the organization was established. So $x=4$ means $4$ years after it was established.

steps.title: Interpret the output
steps.content: The function value $h(4)=46$ means the estimated number of students at that time is $46$.

steps.title: Match the statement
steps.content: The matching statement says there were $46$ students $4$ years after the organization was established. The answer is C.
